reason: The prompt explicitly requires `start_link/1` to honor a caller-supplied `:name`, so starting a second Store as `{FileUpload.Store, [name: :other_store]}` must register under that name; the `:already_started` error shows the solver hardcoded a fixed registered name (e.g. `name: __MODULE__`) and ignored the documented option. The assertion's target behavior (`update_status` on an unknown id returning `{:error, :not_found}` without crashing) is also stated verbatim in the prompt.
